mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'), 0) AS totalMembers, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member WHERE member_type = 'NEWCOMER' AND join_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), 0) AS newMembers, COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(AVG(att.rate), 2) FROM ( SELECT a.attend_date, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) END AS rate FROM erp_attendance a WHERE a.attend_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY a.attend_date ) att), 0) AS avgAttendance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM erp_offering WHERE offering_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), 0) AS totalOffering
